problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: If Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
